meta.content: Bangladesh Parkour Association (BPA) - The National Governing Body of Parkour in Bangladesh. Build Confidence. Overcome Challenge. Take Opportunity.
meta.name: description

meta.content: parkour bangladesh, BPA, bangladesh parkour association, freerunning bangladesh, parkour coaching, parkour events bangladesh, traceurs dhaka
meta.name: keywords

meta.content: Bangladesh Parkour Association | National Governing Body of Parkour
Bangladesh Parkour Association (BPA) - The National Governing Body of Parkour in Bangladesh.

div.h1: Build Confidence. Overcome Challenge. Take Opportunity.
The National Governing Body of Parkour in Bangladesh

a.p: Find out everything you need to know about parkour. Bangladesh's parkour scene began at Chandrima Uddan in Dhaka.
Learn how to get started as a beginner in Bangladesh's growing parkour community.
Join local parkour classes across Dhaka, Chattogram, Sylhet and beyond.

div.p: Bangladesh Parkour Association (BPA) is the official organization dedicated to the growth and development of Parkour and Freerunning in Bangladesh. Founded with the vision of building a strong movement community, BPA works to inspire youth through discipline, creativity, fitness, and self-improvement.
The association promotes safe training, athlete development, community events, workshops, competitions, media production, and international collaboration within the global Parkour scene.
Through training sessions, performances, social media content, and public engagement, BPA continues to empower the next generation of traceurs and freerunners.
To develop and promote Parkour and Freerunning in Bangladesh through education, training, community building, and creative expression.
To establish Bangladesh as a recognized and respected hub for Parkour and movement culture in South Asia.
Our Media Hub features blogs, videos and stories from the BPA community. Explore tips, athlete features, and movement culture from across Bangladesh.

Dhaka has become home to a new generation of Bangladeshi parkour athletes.
Bangladesh Parkour Association documents the journey of our top traceurs as they tackle iconic urban training spots from Chandrima Uddan to Hatirjheel and beyond.
Featuring founding members and rising stars exploring how they tackle fear and progress our sport in South Asia.

a.p: Open community parkour jam at Chandrima Uddan. All skill levels welcome.
Get certified as a parkour coach with the National Governing Body.
The inaugural national championship - Speed, Skill and Style competition.
Beginner-friendly workshop designed for women in Bangladesh.

div.p: Subscribe to the BPA newsletter for updates on training sessions, upcoming events, coaching courses, and the work we do to grow parkour and freerunning across Bangladesh.
By subscribing, you agree to receive email updates from Bangladesh Parkour Association. You can unsubscribe at any time.

div.div:
Bangladesh
Parkour AssociationEST. 2026 • National Governing Body
